TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Leung Chun-ying I 1954 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Leung Chun-ying, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Hong kong anini i ci Leung Chun-ying, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: …ĺ…ôo~u~uŇč ¶ńßo~u~un-jiŇč i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …ĺ…ôo~u~uŇč ¶ńßo~u~un-jiŇč, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ńßo~uŇč ko~uŇč anini i ¶i …ĺ…ôo~u~uŇč ¶ńßo~u~un-jiŇč, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Leung Chun-ying I 1954 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Leung Chun-ying, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Hong kong anini i ci Leung Chun-ying, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: …ĺ…ôo~u~uŇč ¶ńßo~u~un-jiŇč i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …ĺ…ôo~u~uŇč ¶ńßo~u~un-jiŇč, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ńßo~uŇč ko~uŇč anini i ¶i …ĺ…ôo~u~uŇč ¶ńßo~u~un-jiŇč, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
